title: Sanji and Zoro Reach Their Limits
description: On pages 22–25, this part focuses on Unknown person #17, Marco, Unknown person #18, Unknown person #19, Unknown person #20, King as The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.
scene: The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: And so, the Victor was decided.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "But not one person truly lost on that day.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: It was a merry day.

dialogue.speaker: Marco
dialogue.text: Alongside the Whitebeard Pirates' main fleet...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: were the dozens of allied ships that had rushed in from the corners of the ocean.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: To witness what was about to occur...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: ...on the decks of the Moby dick.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We will now commence the sake cup ceremony.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My name is 120, it is my great honor to oversee this proceeding.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: Now, come forth... thatch, the cup- bearer...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: Marco, the observer...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: ...and teach, the witness!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: And now...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: The spade pirates are hereby disbanded!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Sorry for my selfishness.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They gave me the option of us staying as just an allied fleet...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But I wanted to take responsibility for my mistakes.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If any of you don't want to ride on Whitebeard's ship... now is the time to speak up...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: I'll do everything I can for you...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you come aboard, the one you're following will no longer be me.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: ...I wouldn't blame you.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This guy just never stops talking nonsense- skull...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Captain is just that kind of guy after all.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: We're coming with you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: All of us.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Deuce-san already told us all of this would happen!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He didn't even bother waiting to see if it'd come true first!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: That selfishness of yours...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: ...Didn't just start today, you know?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: This is...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: It's our jolly Roger.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: seems like commander thatch grabbed it for us.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: ACE...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: You are a pirate...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ....that holds a mighty flame in the palm of your hands.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We were all enthralled by that flame and gathered under your banner.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: So do us a favor...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: That flag...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: ...the spirit of the spade pirates...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: Let it burn brightly one last time...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And let us stand by your side a little while longer.

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 41 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
